description: The Lamborghini Gallardo, produced from 2003 to 2013, was the most commercially successful Lamborghini ever with over 14,000 built. Its 5.0/5.2-litre V10 produced up to 562 bhp in Superleggera and Squadra Corse forms. The manual-gearbox LP560-4 and lightweight Superleggera are the most sought-after.
